Nîmes

Denim

The indigo cocoon, in the heart of Nîmes.
3guests
1bedroom
40m²
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

On a pedestrian lane in the historic centre, steps from Les Halles, Denim is a cocoon of an apartment where indigo — the colour that made Nîmes’ canvas famous — dresses the walls and the tropical wallpaper.

Designed for two to three guests, air-conditioned and quiet, it puts the city at your feet: market in the morning, the Arena five minutes away, café terraces in the evening. Perfect for a city stay full of character.
